configurePresets.name: sdl-demo
configurePresets.description: Portable SDL3 build, Yoda Stories demo data. Host compiler + SDL3; runs on macOS/Linux/Windows.

configurePresets.name: sdl-full
configurePresets.description: Portable SDL3 build, retail full Yoda Stories (needs YodaFull/ + Yoda Stories/Yodesk.exe).

configurePresets.name: sdl-indy
configurePresets.description: Portable SDL3 build, Indiana Jones (needs YodaIndy/ + INDYDESK/DESKADV.EXE).

configurePresets.name: vc42
configurePresets.description: Original 1997 codegen via the wine-wrapped Visual C++ 4.2 toolchain (macOS/Linux). Not a native-VS build; needs toolchain/vc42/ + wine — see BUILDING.md.

configurePresets.name: vs-sdl-demo
configurePresets.description: Windows/Visual Studio build. Uses vcpkg (VCPKG_ROOT) to auto-install SDL3 + sdl3-mixer from vcpkg.json.

configurePresets.name: vs-sdl-full
configurePresets.displayName: SDL — Yoda Stories retail full (Windows / vcpkg)
configurePresets.description: Windows/Visual Studio build, retail full Yoda. Uses vcpkg (VCPKG_ROOT) to auto-install SDL3 + sdl3-mixer.

configurePresets.name: vs-sdl-indy
configurePresets.description: Windows/Visual Studio build, Indiana Jones. Uses vcpkg (VCPKG_ROOT) to auto-install SDL3 + sdl3-mixer.

buildPresets.name: vs-sdl-full
buildPresets.displayName: SDL — Yoda Stories retail full (Windows / vcpkg)
